title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rail Vikas Nigam - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rail Vikas Nigam - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rail Vikas Nigam family as a Distribution Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rail Vikas Nigam:
Rail Vikas Nigam is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rail Vikas Nigam!
